## Gate definitions

- **`impl_complete`** — Production code lands; no NotImplementedError; all CLI flags wired; all error paths covered.
- **`real_archive_empirical`** — Real-archive empirical measurement on Lane G v3 anchor (or equivalent baseline). Tagged [empirical:<artifact>].
- **`contest_cuda`** — Actual [contest-CUDA] score from Vast.ai 4090 / Modal A100 / equivalent. NOT [contest-CPU advisory]. NEVER MPS.
- **`contest_cpu`** — [contest-CPU] Linux x86_64 public-axis replay for the same archive/runtime; not promotion authority and never macOS/MPS advisory.
- **`strict_preflight`** — STRICT preflight check covering the lane's bug class (or warn-only with documented STRICT promotion path).
- **`three_clean_review`** — 3-clean-pass adversarial review per CLAUDE.md Recursive adversarial review protocol. Counter at 3/3 with rotating perspectives, no new bugs.
- **`memory_entry`** — Memory file documenting empirical result + dispatch metadata + cross-refs.
- **`deploy_runbook`** — Deploy script + heartbeat + watchdog + harvest path documented (e.g. scripts/remote_lane_<id>.sh).

| `lane_apogee_int7` (Apogee int7 block-FP on PR106 (Pareto-DOMINATED by int8)) | **L2** | ✓ | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✓ | ✗ | ✓ | ✓ | DEFERRED-pending-research-with-byte-aligned-int7-packer 2026-05-04 (reframed 2026-05-11 per CLAUDE.md kill-as-last-resort non-negotiable) by tools/apogee_intN_pareto.py — int7 archive is 205,158 bytes (+18,919 vs int8 187,731 bytes) for the same VERY-LOW distortion class. The non-byte-aligned int7 packing requires shift/mask boilerplate per block whereas int8 fits cleanly. Reactivation: only if a future packer eliminates the bit-aligned overhead (e.g., 2x int7 -> 14-bit aligned; or context model on the bit-stream). |

Stacks orthogonally with apogee_intN bit-width reduction. Cost: ~$0.60 (Vast.ai 4090 brute-force search + contest-CUDA eval). Council gate REQUIRED before implementation per design-decisions-non-negotiable. Reactivation: council 5/8 GO + operator approves dispatch. Cross-ref: docs/pr100_latent_sidecar_porting_proposal_20260504.md |
